title: Contact Hero Background
scene_prompt: Cinematic documentary photograph of a modern integrated operations center at blue hour. A sweeping control room with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking an industrial facility at dusk. Multiple large monitoring displays show unified operational dashboards with flowing data streams converging into a single view. The space is architecturally clean — long horizontal desk surfaces, ergonomic stations, warm indirect lighting from the ceiling mixing with cool blue light from exterior twilight. Foreground shows a single empty analyst station in sharp focus with a cup of coffee, inviting the viewer into the seat. Background shows the facility's lights beginning to glow amber through the windows. The composition uses strong horizontal lines — the desk surface, the window horizon, the display row — creating calm authority. Left side of frame has clear breathing room suitable for text overlay. Shot on 35mm lens, f/2.8 aperture. Kodak Portra 800 film stock. Warm analog color palette — forest green (#0f4c3a) deep shadows under desks and equipment, Safety Amber (#F4A261) highlights from facility lighting mixing with Intelligence Navy (#0A1128) twilight sky. Fine organic film grain. Natural vignetting. Editorial documentary quality. The image feels like an invitation to sit down and begin — the viewer is about to start a conversation that changes how they see their operations. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no identifiable human faces.
palette: Forest Green #0f4c3a shadows, Safety Amber #F4A261 facility lighting, Intelligence Navy #0A1128 twilight
composition: Rule of thirds — empty analyst station at right third intersection, clear left zone for text overlay, strong horizontal lines creating calm authority
